monster.name: HelmutVanHeuten
monster.description: Helmut Van Heuten is a wealthy and respected merchant, in his sixties, with a well-groomed white beard and fine but unpretentious clothing. He always wears a ring with the symbol of Tyr — a set of scales — and has the habit of offering hot tea to anyone who sits in his study. He has scribe's hands, not a warrior's, and a calm, gentle voice that inspires trust. He is courteous, methodical, and genuinely devout. He is not an adventurer and doesn't pretend to be — he knows his role is to provide resources, not to wield swords. Role: secondary
